title: Dtail Spaces
description: A 3D application built with Unreal Engine 5 that lets fashion brands create virtual store environments with fixtures and products, walking customers through customizable showrooms.
longdescription: Dtail Spaces is an interactive 3D application where fashion brands can build hyperrealistic virtual showrooms by dragging and dropping fixtures and products into customizable retail spaces. Users showcase collections with 360-degree product views and detailed zoom, providing a hands-on alternative to traditional 2D presentations for B2B buyers and internal merchandising teams.

work.title: Refactoring
work.description: Working on Refactoring large portions of the Project.

work.title: Feature Development
work.description: Developing new features for the application (NDA).

title: Ember Sword
description: An open-world sandbox MMORPG by Bright Star Studios.
longdescription: Ember Sword is a cross-platform free-to-play fantasy MMORPG. Players can own, control, and evolve their land while trading assets with other players. The game runs on the Radiance Engine, a custom engine built by Bright Star Studios.

work.description: Built the open world featuring PvP zones, player-owned plots, questing, creature spawners, and patrolling creatures. Also worked on the instanced gameplay mechanics in the Ultra Deep dungeon.
work.title: Exploration

work.description: Built the Trade Pack system where players gather resources, craft them into trade packs, and deliver them across the map for profit. Other players can steal your packs, creating a real risk vs reward dynamic.
work.title: Trade Packs

work.description: Helped set up and iterate on the Ability system. Ember Sword uses a custom timeline system where we assign triggers to specific times, allowing things to happen simultaneously on client and server.
work.title: Combat

work.description: Created the ValueBag, a flexible data container used for abilities, behaviors, instanced data tracking, and more.
work.title: Gameplay Data

work.description: Built a custom Behavior Tree solution with an engine visualizer to inspect real-time creature decision-making. Examples: boars encircle players, bandit javelin throwers keep distance, and the Ultra Deep boss has unique abilities and phases.
work.title: Creature Behaviors

work.description: Created the first iteration of the gathering system. It was later overhauled by another team member, but the original design was eventually brought back and enhanced.
work.title: Gathering

work.description: Built the server-side crafting mechanics. Players collect resources, find interactive crafting tables in the world, and use them to make items.
work.title: Crafting

work.description: Designed and built a questing system together with my gameplay lead (ex-World of Warcraft). It's built to be performant and easy to extend with new quest objectives.
work.title: Quests

work.description: Built PvP as a game mechanic, worked on the chat system, supported parties, and created the Emote system.
work.title: Player Interaction

work.description: Each boss has custom mechanics. Canavar uses close-range abilities based on player positions and charges to close gaps. Shauk returns to the center of a circular arena for special attacks and has two phases where every attack is greatly enhanced.
work.title: Boss Battles

work.description: Many other systems and features I contributed to over 4+ years.
work.title: And more...

title: Motherlode Tycoon
description: A take on the classic tycoon genre in Fortnite Creative, aiming for a fun and engaging experience without predatory hooks.
longdescription: A tycoon game built in Fortnite Creative (UEFN) with my friend. We wanted to make something that's genuinely fun rather than just designed to keep kids glued to the screen.

work.description: Designed the core gameplay loop together with my friend: owning plots, building and upgrading structures, displaying resources, 3D world UI, and more.
work.title: Core Design

work.description: Built responsive gathering feedback with clear visual information. Players collect resources from the world to build and upgrade structures.
work.title: Gathering

work.description: Built a persistent cosmetics system where players can purchase and equip clothing, accessories, and other visual customizations.
work.title: Cosmetics

work.description: Built a cooperative system where players work together on shared objectives like building structures or gathering resources.
work.title: Co-op Projects

work.description: Built teleportation for quick travel, plus barriers that gate areas behind objectives or progression milestones.
work.title: Teleportation, Barriers and More

work.description: Built a reward system for completing objectives, hitting milestones, or simply waiting.
work.title: Gifts

work.description: Designed the main level layout including resource spawners, player plots, and the overall look and feel.
work.title: Level Design

work.description: Various other systems and features.
work.title: And more...

title: Farmion
description: A time-management wizard-themed farming sim with cooperative play!
longdescription: Solo dev production. Various art is from the Unreal Marketplace, some made by me. Farmion is a time-management wizard-themed farming sim with cooperative play!

work.description: Time management is everything. You have limited daylight and every day is a 'Tick' in gameplay terms. Forget to water crops? They die. Left your cows outside? They vanish. You'll die too if you're caught outside during the Cycle transition.
work.title: A Cycle a Day

work.description: You can hold and throw any object. Real physics isn't in play, just the illusion of it, keeping things reliable in multiplayer while still feeling satisfying.
work.title: Physics Fun

work.description: Plant crops that last for X days and require Y water. Bees speed up growth, hostile Bugs attack your plants.
work.title: Stage-Based Farming

work.description: Purchase upgrades like a Pantry to store goods, an Animal Barn for your livestock, a Greenhouse, and more.
work.title: Upgrades Everywhere

work.description: Games are better together. Farmion is designed for 1-6 players from the ground up.
work.title: Multiplayer

work.description: Redesign your magical mansion while waiting for the night to pass.
work.title: House & Character Customization

work.description: Make cheese from your animals' milk, curd it, age it in the right environment, and sell it for a profit. Or ruin it entirely.
work.title: Cheese System

work.description: Throw any item into the Giant all-eating Statue and get unique buffs for a limited time. Recycling has never been this productive.
work.title: Buffs System

work.description: You can only hold one item at a time, so use carts to haul multiple items around.
work.title: Transportation and Carts

work.description: Various other systems and features.
work.title: And more...

title: Radiance Engine
description: The creation of a web-based MMORPG game engine.
longdescription: Radiance is a custom engine built by Bright Star Studios for the MMORPG Ember Sword. It's web-based, enabling cross-platform play.

work.description: Created a system to sync Unity with Radiance during the transition between engines. This let Level Design and World Design keep working in Unity until Radiance had matching capabilities.
work.title: Unity to Radiance Sync

work.description: Created an Animation State Machine Editor so designers could view animation states and their transitions visually.
work.title: Animation State Machine Editor

work.description: Built a visual Behavior Tree Editor for creating and modifying AI behaviors.
work.title: Behavior Tree Editor

work.description: Created an Item Editor for designers to create and modify in-game items.
work.title: Item Editor

work.description: Created a Crafting Recipe Editor for managing recipes. Both this and the Item Editor are built on a shared Base Editor Tool I created.
work.title: Crafting Recipe Editor

title: BitFarers
description: A co-op dungeon running game with a theme traversal twist.
longdescription: A theme-traversal co-op FPS with roguelike elements. Players travel through differently themed dungeons, each with unique mechanics and enemies, and upgrade their characters as they progress.

work.description: Created seamless multiplayer level transitions so all players travel through dungeon levels together and regroup at the lobby.
work.title: Seamless Co-op

work.description: Worked on weapon mechanics: shooting, reloading, weapon switching, aiming down sights, and more. Accuracy and feel had to be right for all players, with proper replication so everyone sees correct third-person muzzle flashes and projectiles.
work.title: First Person Gunplay

work.description: Implemented a loot table system for breakables, enemies, and chests.
work.title: Loot, Loot, and Destructible Loot

work.description: Created the in-game UI: buffs, debuffs, health, ammo, weapon display, and ammo inventory.
work.title: User Interface

title: IdleCards
description: An idle game with card-based combat for phones.
longdescription: An idle game at its core with an active card battling system on top. Players collect cards, upgrade them, and use them in battles to progress.

work.description: Created a turn-based card battling system with AI opponents. The AI evaluates the board state to determine its best move.
work.title: Card Battling vs AI

work.description: Built offline simulation so the game progresses while you're away. Come back to big numbers and that sweet dopamine hit.
work.title: Offline Idle Progression

work.description: Worked on 'fake 3D' card elements you can play on boards, plus 2D interfaces for buying and upgrading buildings.
work.title: Unity UI

title: Andromeda Resonance
description: 3D Wave Function Collapse algorithm for Unreal Engine with a mini-game to showcase it.
longdescription: My graduation project at the University of the Arts Utrecht for my BSc in Game Programming. A 3D Wave Function Collapse algorithm for Unreal Engine with a mini-game to showcase it.

work.description: Implemented the Wave Function Collapse algorithm in 3D space in Unreal Engine. This world generation algorithm produces high variety based on local similarity.
work.title: Wave Function Collapse

work.description: Fly around the generated levels with a drone to showcase the results.
work.title: Drone Flying

work.description: Wrote a paper on the Wave Function Collapse algorithm and created a tool to generate 3D levels in Unreal Engine. Also made a YouTube tutorial on creating data assets for the algorithm.
work.title: Graduation Papers & Tools

title: Cat Parent
description: Finn & Dusty need a lot of attention!
longdescription: Two Ragdoll cats: one white, one grey. Excellent office staff.

title: Kio
description: A glassblowing puzzle and adventure game. Light all glass objects by blowing glass shapes that redirect light in specific directions.

title: StratEgel GameWork
description: A framework by StratEgel B.V. in cooperation with Strategis for social gameplay. Players create an ideal world while balancing the goals of multiple parties.

title: Hack Stevie
description: A game for Dutch primary school kids (groups 7 and 8) to raise cybersecurity awareness. Built during my internship at Flavour for 'De week van de Mediawijsheid'. This game is the prequel to 'Hack Shield'.

title: And more...
language: Mostly C# and some C++ during this period
description: Various games for university, hobby projects and whatnot. Check out the archived portfolio page for more.
